summary: Excellent soundboard capture featuring Jerry’s soaring Good Lovin vocal and a memorable Dark Star/Weather Report Suite moment.
review: The recording is praised as the best‑sound many have ever heard, delivering crystal‑clear soundboard quality. Musically the show has highlights – Jerry’s vocal on “Good Lovin” and a late‑night Dark Star that segues into Bob’s brief Weather Report Suite intro – though one reviewer felt the overall playing was modest at the time.

ai_rating.rationale: Strong musical moments and excellent soundboard quality offset a few lukewarm comments about overall performance, yielding an above‑average rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Multiple reviewers call it the best sound they've heard; no complaints of muddiness or drop‑outs. Clear, crisp mix with full band balance.

show_quality.setlist_flow: An impromptu, sunny Polo Fields show that felt modest at the time but now is appreciated for its historic vibe and the highlighted moments.

band_member_comments.Jerry: His vocal on Good Lovin is singled out as exceptional.
band_member_comments.Bob: Noted for slipping a Weather Report Suite guitar intro into the final seconds of Dark Star.
